who: logistics supervisors at freight brokers managing 5–15 delivery routes/day
offer: For logistics supervisors at freight brokers processing 5–15 delivery routes/day, route deviations cause late deliveries. We provide real-time tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or phone calls.
problem: inability to monitor and respond to route deviations in real-time
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics supervisors
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics supervisors with demo video
Community forums where logistics supervisors share tools
try_it: Let users try real-time tracking on 1-3 routes
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing route data
